title: How loud do you listen to EOE when you watch it
display_title: How loud do you listen to EOE when you watch it
wikitext:
[]: How loud do you listen to EOE when you watch it? Post by Boredom » Wed Oct 21, 2009 8:19 pm I just bought this sound system about a month ago, I watched EOE(sub not dub) at a retared loudness. I felt all of teh explosions pounding in my chest, the screams...oh the screams... Anyways, hows the loudest you've watched EOE? kinda of dumb question...9_9

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Oct 21, 2009 8:22 pm I watched it on my PC. Ironically the first time I saw Death and Rebirth and EoE subtitled. I say it's ironic for me because I usually favor watching the series dubbed I guess. So I guess at a "normal" level?

[]: Post by backseatjesus » Wed Oct 21, 2009 8:28 pm Enough for me to hear it. I've always wanted to watch the series with Headphones though.

[]: Post by Boredom » Wed Oct 21, 2009 8:36 pm you guys are no fun...lol Joseph the PRPD wrote: I watched it on my PC. Ironically the first time I saw Death and Rebirth and EoE subtitled. I say it's ironic for me because I usually favor watching the series dubbed I guess. So I guess at a "normal" level?

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Wed Oct 21, 2009 8:36 pm I tended to mess with the sound when I watch something. Turning the sound up and down depending on what’s happening on screen or if I happen to really like the background music.

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:03 pm child of Lilith wrote: I tended to mess with the sound when I watch something. Turning the sound up and down depending on what’s happening on screen or if I happen to really like the background music.

[]: Post by Boredom » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:06 pm subs screams are more tasty IMO

[]: Post by schismatics » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:07 pm Uhmm...I'd guess I first watched EoE dubbed over teh interbutts with some recording monitor style headphones (which was nice, lots of oomph when necessary ). But normally I watch at regular volume. Speaking of volume 'n stuff am I the only one who thinks that EoE and DaR have something wrong with the sound levels on the DVDs? I mean the background music is really quiet.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 21, 2009 9:08 pm I think this is really scraping the barrel here.
